creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!
 
 > This is a major version update to a library with many dependencies,
 > direct and indirect. This need to be tested in the xorg dev repo
 > for some time before it is pushed to the regular ports repo,
 > especially since it contains shlib version bumps.
 
 No problem with that.
 
 > Does it solve any  specific issues or is it updates just for the
 > sake of updates?
 
 Maybe it correlates with xcb-proto, otherwise it does not fix
 specific things.
 
 -- 
 pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         7 years to go !
